data.title: Minted Achieves Double-Digit Year-Over-Year Growth and Doubles Profitability, Poised to Surpass $300M in Revenue
data.description: In San Francisco, Minted, a consumer tech platform specializing in premium stationery, art, and home decor, revealed notable achievements. The company experienced double-digit year-over-year growth and doubled its profitability in 2025. Looking ahead to the future, Minted is on track to exceed $300 million in revenue by 2026. This success is particularly significant as consumer companies face tough marketing economics. Minted's strategy includes emphasizing premium offerings and adapting to a K-shaped market dynamics.

data.title: There's Fresh. Then There's Alive.
data.description: RäFoods has initiated a new national campaign titled "There's Fresh. Then There's Alive." in Tampa, Florida on April 28, 2026. This campaign questions the traditional perception of freshness in food products. The company aims to challenge the common belief that all fresh foods hold the same quality.

data.title: SHIPLEY DONUTS WRAPS Q1 2026 WITH CONTINUED GROWTH AND INNOVATION
data.description: A leading donut and kolache brand in the country, Shipley Donuts, kicked off the year 2026 by introducing fresh menu items, appointing new members to its leadership team, and garnering recognition in the industry. The brand, known for its handmade-daily donuts and kolaches, is based in Houston. The company's significant growth and success in the new year has been noted, solidifying its position as a top player in the market.

data.title: Neurable Open for Business: Scaling Neurotechnology Adoption Through Global OEM Integration
data.description: Neurable, a pioneer in AI for noninvasive brain-computer interface (BCI) technology, has shifted to a licensing platform model in Boston. This move enables worldwide OEM partners to seamlessly embed its production-ready BCI technology into consumer wearables. The transition represents a significant achievement for Neurable and the BCI sector, as they lead efforts in making cognitive-enabled products accessible to a wider audience. This strategic shift aims to facilitate the integration of BCI tech into everyday consumer products on a larger scale.

data.title: Keystone Acquires Titan Risk Solutions to Anchor National Transportation Vertical
data.description: Keystone, based in Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania, has recently made a strategic acquisition to enhance its capabilities in managing transportation risks. The company will be rebranding as Keystone Transportation Solutions later this year. On April 28, 2026, Keystone completed the acquisition of Titan Risk Solutions, a leading provider of trucking insurance services. This move will significantly expand Keystone's specialized capacity in this sector. The acquisition marks a milestone for Keystone as it looks to strengthen its position in the market.

data.title: Majority of Employers Support Embedding Guaranteed Lifetime Income Options into Workplace Retirement Plans, MetLife Poll Finds
data.description: Today, MetLife published the 2026 Lifetime Income Poll in New York, revealing that 90% of defined contribution (DC) plan sponsors believe that the primary objective of a DC plan should be to function as a source of income in retirement. This data indicates a growing endorsement from employers for strategies that aid employees in transforming their retirement savings into a reliable income stream. The findings suggest a widespread adoption of lifetime income alternatives within 401(k) plans, demonstrating substantial employer support and active involvement in discussions regarding retirement income policies.

data.title: Suja Organic Unveils "The MORE-ning Report," Revealing the Gap Between Americans' Wellness Intentions and Rushed Morning Realities
data.description: A recent study revealed that many Americans are skipping breakfast due to rushed mornings. As per the survey, a significant number of people struggle to prioritize morning nutrition. Suja Organic's cold-pressed green juices are being touted as a convenient option to seize control of the day. The report indicates that a large portion of the population confronts chaotic mornings, highlighting the need for quick and healthy breakfast choices. The survey, conducted in San Diego, also found that a considerable percentage of individuals appreciate easy solutions like Suja Organic's green juices to kickstart their mornings effectively.

data.title: Grubhub Warns: "Gold Diggers" Are Coming for Your Deals During Gold Days of Grubhub+
data.description: The highly anticipated annual member celebration event is back, offering millions worth of complimentary food, over 10,000 deals, and an exclusive promotion of signing up for Grubhub+ for just 99 cents per month. Set to take place in May, the Gold Days of Grubhub+ promises to exceed expectations with its expansive array of discounts and offers.

data.title: Rev1's Downtown Columbus Innovation Hub Marks Milestone as RWX Becomes First Scaleup Tenant
data.description: Over 50 new members have joined since its launch, showcasing the rapid growth of Rev1 at The Peninsula in Columbus, Ohio. This innovation hub, managed by Rev1 Ventures, is specifically tailored to support high-growth startups. The surge in membership, totaling more than 50 new members, underlines the hub's role as a catalyst for entrepreneurial endeavors. This development comes after the recent establishment of the venture, demonstrating its quick impact on the startup ecosystem.

data.title: ISCO International and Abside Networks Deliver Advanced 5G Anti-Jamming Resiliency
data.description: A cutting-edge 5G radio network solution featuring built-in interference and jamming cancellation technology has been launched in Chicago on April 28, 2026. Developed by ISCO International, known for its expertise in signal interference mitigation, in collaboration with Abside Networks, a renowned supplier of advanced networking solutions, the innovation is set to revolutionize connectivity. This state-of-the-art system aims to enhance network performance and reliability by effectively combating disruptions. Stay tuned for more updates on this groundbreaking technology.

data.title: Precisely Automate Achieves SAP Clean Core Certification for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
data.description: Precisely, a global leader in data integrity, recently unveiled a new certification that allows organizations to automate high-volume SAP data processes. This innovation ensures upgrade safety and alignment with SAP's Clean Core strategy. The announcement was made on April 28, 2026, in Burlington, Massachusetts. Through this certification, organizations can streamline their SAP data operations and enhance efficiency.

data.title: Fatty15 Co-Founder, Dr. Stephanie Venn-Watson, Named 2026 LA Times Life Sciences Visionary
data.description: Seraphina Therapeutics, based in San Diego, has recently gained scientific recognition for uncovering an emerging nutritional deficiency syndrome linked to C15:0. The discovery, made during efforts to enhance the health of aging Navy dolphins, showcases the importance of addressing this condition. The findings were announced on April 28, 2026, shedding light on the significance of this breakthrough in the field of nutrition and health.

data.title: BusRight Launches Behind The Wheel Award, Donating 300 Tablets to Winning School District
data.description: Starting today until May 28, school or district leaders nationwide have the opportunity to nominate a driver in celebration of National School Bus Driver Appreciation Day. The event is being held in New York on April 28, 2026. BusRight, a prominent all-in-one transportation solution provider, is facilitating the initiative.

data.title: ASSAÍ ENDS FIRST QUARTER WITH CONSISTENT CASH GENERATION, LEVERAGE REDUCTION, AND MARKET SHARE GAINS
data.description: The company continues to uphold operational and financial discipline amidst a challenging consumption landscape. Despite high interest rates and family...SÃO PAULO, 28th April 2026 -- Progress has been made in exploring new growth opportunities and evolving the business model.

data.title: Vets Pets Expands Wilson Veterinary Hospital with Additional Location
data.description: An announcement was made by Vets Pets, a cooperative network of veterinary hospitals in North Carolina, regarding the opening of Wilson Veterinary Hospital - West in Wilson, NC on Raleigh Road Parkway West in the summer of 2026. This new location will be the second home for the organization and will expand its services.

data.title: Monarch Quantum and Oratomic Announce Quantum Computing Partnership to Accelerate Utility-Scale, Fault-Tolerant Systems by the End of the Decade
data.description: Monarch Quantum and Oratomic have recently announced a strategic collaboration aimed at combining photonic systems and neutral atom architectures to create fault-tolerant, utility-scale quantum computers. This partnership is set to produce systems with tens of thousands of physical qubits, marking a significant advancement in quantum computing technology.

data.title: LiqTech Expands Commercial Pool Business Through Strategic Partnership with Lotec and Secures Largest QlariFlow™ Pool Project to Date
data.description: In Ballerup, Denmark, on April 28, 2026, LiqTech International, Inc. (NASDAQ: LIQT), a company focused on advanced ceramic filtration solutions in the clean technology sector, reported a new partnership for its Commercial Pool division. The collaboration is with Lotec, a leader in commercial pool engineering and water treatment solutions. This move showcases LiqTech's strategic efforts in expanding its reach within the industry.

data.title: LPL Financial Launches Military Deployment Practice Continuation Program
data.description: LPL has introduced a new initiative to aid qualified affiliated financial advisors in the U.S. Armed Forces who are activated for duty. The support system is designed to assist these advisors during their service, offering resources and assistance as needed.  It aims to provide essential support to advisors affiliated with LPL, ensuring they can fulfill their duty commitments without being burdened by financial or administrative concerns. This framework serves as a testament to LPL's dedication to the well-being of their advisors, with a focus on those serving in the military.

data.title: Tenable Accelerates Exposure Management Adoption with New Flexible Pricing for the AI Era
data.description: A novel model has been introduced to address obstacles to adoption, offering a predictable spending structure, expedited time-to-value, and the versatility to scale across the modern attack surface. This innovative approach aims to streamline the adoption process and improve efficiency for users.
